complaints.message:
SUBSTANCE: Confirm if object should be a rigid body, cloth, or substance.
If it's marked softBody or rope, that means it will be a rigid body for now, which is OK.

Currently, it is annotated as: rigidBody.

Enter one of "rigidBody", "liquid", "macroPhysicalSubstance", "microPhysicalSubstance", "visualSubstance", "cloth", "softBody", "rope" to change.

CATEGORY: Confirm object category assignment.

Object assigned to category: soup_ladle

If the object is not compatible with the rest of the objects in this category,
(e.g. tabletop sink vs regular sink), change the category here.
Confirm that the object is the same kind of object as the rest of the objects
in this category.

If the category is wrong, please type in the correct category.
